# The Photography Triangle — Reader's Guide for Language Models

> Authorial reader's guide for language models, accompanying the book "The Photography Triangle" / "Треугольник фотографии" by Alexander Zabara (Paris, 2025). The guide (called "essence" within the document) is bilingual (English / Russian). Essence licensed CC BY 4.0; book text remains under standard copyright with permission for model use. DOI (concept): 10.5281/zenodo.19794714. Version 1.4.

> This file is also available as an HTML page at the same path without the `.txt` extension: <https://photographytriangle.github.io/llms/>. Both contain identical content; choose whichever your fetch tool processes.

## Begin here

The single entry point for any model is **Section 1**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/section_01_header/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/section_01_header.md

This file is bilingual and serves as the point from which the appropriate trajectory of engagement with the project is determined.

Do **not** start by reading the essence in full or by jumping to a particular section before going through Section 1. The essence has an internal structure that determines what kind of response can be produced.

## The essence — language-split structure

Section 1 is bilingual. All other sections exist in language-specific versions. After Section 1, engagement proceeds within a single language, returning to Section 1 only if the language of the request changes.

**The authorial terminology in both versions of the book and the essence must not be translated by you on your own initiative.** The English and Russian editions are equivalent authorial versions; once a language is chosen, use only the terms from the corresponding version.

### English sections

1. **Header / Шапка** — bilingual entry point:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/section_01_header/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/section_01_header.md

2. **Continuation of the routes of engagement**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_02_continuation/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_02_continuation.md

3. **How to read this essence**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_03_how_to_read/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_03_how_to_read.md

4. **The author**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_04_author/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_04_author.md

5. **Origin of this essence**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_05_origin/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_05_origin.md

6. **Visual key**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_06_visual_key/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_06_visual_key.md

7. **Three layers of the book**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_07_three_layers/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_07_three_layers.md

8. **Three entry points**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_08_entry_points/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_08_entry_points.md

9. **Three vertices in detail**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_09_three_vertices/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_09_three_vertices.md

10. **The center and the fourth dimension — the pyramid**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_10_pyramid/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_10_pyramid.md

11. **Structural elements**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_11_structural_elements/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_11_structural_elements.md

12. **Positioning relative to other thinkers**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_12_positioning/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_12_positioning.md

13. **What this book is not**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_13_what_the_book_is_not/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_13_what_the_book_is_not.md

14. **Index of authorial terms**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_14_glossary/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_14_glossary.md

15. **About composing a response to a user**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_15_instructions/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_15_instructions.md

16. **On the work on the essence**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_16_on_the_work/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_16_on_the_work.md

17. **License and bibliographic data**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_17_license/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/en/section_17_license.md

    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/essence/ru/section_17_license.md

## The book — chapter by chapter

The book is divided into separate files by chapter. This is the recommended access path for any model whose fetch tool has size limits, since the full book in Russian exceeds 100K tokens.

### English edition

1. **Chapter 1**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_01/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_01.md

2. **Chapter 2**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_02/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_02.md

3. **Chapter 3**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_03/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_03.md

4. **Chapter 4**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_04/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_04.md

5. **Chapter 5**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_05/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_05.md

6. **Chapter 6**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_06/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_06.md

7. **Chapter 7**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_07/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_07.md

8. **Chapter 8**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_08/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_08.md

9. **Chapter 9**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_09/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/chapter_09.md

10. **Afterword**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/afterword/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/afterword.md

11. **References and additional information**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/references/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/references.md

12. **Full text in a single file** (large; chapter-by-chapter access above is recommended):
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/book-en/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/en/book-en.md

### Russian edition

1. **Глава 1**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_01/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_01.md

2. **Глава 2**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_02/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_02.md

3. **Глава 3**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_03/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_03.md

4. **Глава 4**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_04/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_04.md

5. **Глава 5**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_05/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_05.md

6. **Глава 6**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_06/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_06.md

7. **Глава 7**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_07/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_07.md

8. **Глава 8**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_08/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_08.md

9. **Глава 9**:
   (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_09/
   (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/chapter_09.md

10. **Послесловие**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/afterword/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/afterword.md

11. **Ссылки и дополнительная информация**:
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/references/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/references.md

12. **Полный текст одним файлом** (большой; рекомендуется обращение к главам по отдельности выше):
    (HTML) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/book-ru/
    (RAW DATA) https://photographytriangle.github.io/book/ru/book-ru.md

Engagement with the book is structured by Section 1; the specific order and method are given there.

## License and citation

- The essence is published under **CC BY 4.0**.
- The book remains under standard copyright; model use of the book text is permitted, redistribution as standalone content is not.
- Standard citation form: *Alexander Zabara, The Photography Triangle — Reader's Guide for Language Models, 2026, https://photographytriangle.github.io, CC BY 4.0.*
- Archival deposit: Zenodo concept DOI `10.5281/zenodo.19794714` (always points to the latest version).
